allow: Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -ppassword tp_music -e "SHOW CREATE TABLE song\\G")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT name, singer_id, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM tp_music.album GROUP BY name, singer_id HAVING cnt > 1")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT name, COUNT\(DISTINCT singer_id\) as singer_count FROM tp_music.album GROUP BY name HAVING singer_count > 1")

Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT a.name, a.singer_id, s.name as singer_name FROM tp_music.album a LEFT JOIN tp_music.singer s ON a.singer_id = s.id WHERE a.name IN \(''守村人'', ''天外来物'', ''无数''\)")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM tp_music.song_singer WHERE singer_id = 1")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT ss.song_id, s.id, s.name FROM tp_music.song_singer ss LEFT JOIN tp_music.song s ON ss.song_id = s.id WHERE ss.singer_id = 1 LIMIT 5")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT id FROM tp_music.song WHERE id IN \(SELECT song_id FROM tp_music.song_singer WHERE singer_id = 1\) LIMIT 5")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT ss.song_id, s.id FROM tp_music.song_singer ss LEFT JOIN tp_music.song s ON ss.song_id = s.id WHERE ss.singer_id = 1 LIMIT 10")
Bash(mysql -u root -ppassword -e "SELECT id, name FROM tp_music.song WHERE id IN \(1,2,3,4,5\) LIMIT 5")
